scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,menu-admin,restaurant-site -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run backend:start" "npm run menu-admin:dev" "npm run restaurant-site:dev"
scripts.menu-admin-react:build: npm run core:build && npm --workspace @menu-admin-embed-sdk/menu-admin-react run build
scripts.menu-admin-react:test: npm run core:build && npm --workspace @menu-admin-embed-sdk/menu-admin-react run test
scripts.menu-admin-react:typecheck: npm run core:build && npm --workspace @menu-admin-embed-sdk/menu-admin-react run typecheck
scripts.menu-admin:dev: npm run menu-admin-react:build && npm --workspace @menu-admin-embed-sdk/menu-admin run dev
scripts.menu-admin:build: npm run menu-admin-react:build && npm --workspace @menu-admin-embed-sdk/menu-admin run build
scripts.menu-admin:test: npm run menu-admin-react:build && npm --workspace @menu-admin-embed-sdk/menu-admin run test
scripts.menu-admin:typecheck: npm run menu-admin-react:build && npm --workspace @menu-admin-embed-sdk/menu-admin run typecheck
scripts.test: npm run backend:smoke && npm run core:test && npm run menu-admin-react:test && npm run menu-admin:test && npm run restaurant-site:build && npm run sdk:build
scripts.typecheck: npm run backend:typecheck && npm run core:typecheck && npm run menu-admin-react:typecheck && npm run menu-admin:typecheck && npm run restaurant-site:typecheck && npm run sdk:typecheck
